expectations.text: Asks at least 2 clarifying questions before proposing a solution
expectations.evidence: 5 clarifying questions in a table: doc type, review-first vs auto-write, language scope, granularity, model choice. All with default answers and reasoning.

expectations.text: References actual files or patterns from the cape project codebase
expectations.evidence: Reads and references agents/codebase-investigator.md and agents/internet-researcher.md. Extracts specific patterns: frontmatter fields (name, description, model), naming convention, description convention, tone.

expectations.text: Proposes at least 2 distinct approaches with pros and cons
expectations.evidence: Only one approach proposed: 'Proposed approach' section describes a single plan (mirror existing agent pattern). No alternative approaches compared.

expectations.text: Epic contains a Requirements (IMMUTABLE) section with specific, testable statements
expectations.evidence: No epic structure. Has 'Success criteria' checklist and 'Anti-patterns' but no Requirements (IMMUTABLE) section.

expectations.text: Anti-patterns use 'NO X (reason: Y)' format with reasoning
expectations.evidence: 4 anti-patterns with correct format: 'NO invented APIs (reason: documentation must reflect actual code, not assumptions)', 'NO documenting private internals by default (reason: ...)', 'NO writing files without user review (reason: ...)', 'NO ignoring existing doc comments (reason: ...)'.

expectations.text: Creates exactly one first task, not zero or multiple
expectations.evidence: No task structure. States 'Single deliverable: Create agents/doc-writer.md' but doesn't frame it as a task with implementation steps and success criteria in the skill's format.
No source code files created. Includes an output format template example but no actual agent file was written.

expectations.text: Includes a Key Decisions table with Question/Answer/Implication columns
expectations.evidence: No Key Decisions table. Questions are in a table but with columns #/Question/Default answer/Reasoning — different structure, no Implication column.
